name: I-arch-006 — Beat-both 19-fix forensic campaign + bounded parallelism + 5-VM scale-out run
operator_directive_2026_06_15: Execute the consolidated bug list (5 forensic streams). Build all 19 fixes (18 forensic + fix #19 bounded internal parallelism), Claude writes the code directly (parallel agents where files don't collide; serialize the hot files openrouter_client/entailment_judge/multi_section_generator/run_honest_sweep_r3/live_retriever); self-test each (unit + offline smoke); then ONE consolidated Codex diff review (NOT 18) whose only job is confirm zero faithfulness relaxation + zero new silent-drop; then BEHAVIORAL preflight (1-query canary exercising the fixed paths); then re-run the 5 golden questions ONE-PER-VM across 5 independent VMs in parallel (scale-out, spend authorized for speed — sidesteps the 3-on-one-box OOM that killed drb_76). Then §-1.1 line-by-line audit vs gpt_5_5_pro + gemini_3_1_pro.
process: 1 build all (parallel non-colliding; Claude edits hot files direct)
3 ONE consolidated Codex diff gate (faithfulness checklist)
5 5-VM scale-out run (1 Q per VM) -> §-1.1 audit
run_design: 5 independent VMs, ONE golden question per VM, running in parallel. Each box: internal BOUNDED parallelism (~8-16 concurrent entailment verifiers, ~5-7 concurrent section generators), questions SERIAL per box. Consolidation/basket dedup stays a deterministic post-step. Each section independently verified. Faithfulness-neutral (concurrency changes timing not verdicts).
forensic_ledger: state/forensic_bug_list.md (26 findings, 5 streams: live-monitor + drb_75 hang + drb_78 hang + drb_72/76/90 deep-read + Marlin/Codex)
codex_gate: ONE consolidated diff review of the whole batch; the ~6 faithfulness/clinical-touching fixes (BUG-14/15/19/7/17/18) get the careful line-by-line read before any paid run
keystone: Unified TIGHT TOTAL DEADLINE on every LLM call (F33 generator stream + HANG-J1 judge + HANG-J2 socket leak + BUG-22 18-32min generator calls) — built first
held_runs: drb_75 (F33 generator hang), drb_78 (HANG-J1 judge hang), drb_76 (BUG-21 silent death, likely OOM) — all 3 pre-generation corpus_snapshot pools reserved (on-box /root/reserved_snapshots + local state/reserved_corpus_snapshots). drb_72 + drb_90 still live on the Vast box but THROWAWAY baselines (buggy code).
hard_constraints: faithfulness gates (strict_verify/NLI/4-role/D8/span-grounding) NEVER relaxed — only INPUT hygiene + timing change; open-weight models only (deepseek-v4-pro/glm-5.1/minimax-m2/qwen3.6, no gemma/closed); §-1.3 DNA (weight-not-filter, consolidate-not-drop, basket faithfulness, no caps/targets/thinners — BUG-18 REMOVES a breadth target); PID-scoped kills only (operator runs concurrent codex/processes); verdict = §-1.1 line-by-line audit, never a metric; durable state (this file + MASTER_FIX_LIST + forensic_bug_list + session_log + GitHub #1262) updated per fix
certification: 5/5 questions produce complete report.md+manifest (no hang, no silent death) AND §-1.1 line-by-line audit completed vs both competitors AND beat-both assessed honestly (hypothesis->evidence) = done
vast_box: instance 40999509 RTX A6000 $0.44/hr ssh -p 39508 root@ssh5.vast.ai — destroy only when ALL held re-runs done + reports pulled local
